productDisplayName: Latin Quarters Women Magenta & Brown Check Top
description: Style Note This checked top with a pretty tie up, is the season's summer essential. latin quarters can be relied upon to offer a whole collection of style, and they don't disappoint with this checked top. Style this with your favourite jeans and ballet flats for a sweet, girly vibe. Product Details Magenta and brown checked top with a keyhole opening on the front, a tie-up woven through the keyhole, round elasticated and smocked neckline, front buttoned placket, long sleeves with elasticated cuffs, elasticated at the waist and a curved hem Material and Care 100% cotton Machine wash cold with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach Tumble dry low Warm iron; do not iron on decorations Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8” and chest 33”) is wearing a size M
